document_details.name: topographic_survey
document_details.rationale: Required for all projects — establishes site boundaries, levels, and contours. The 12,000 sqm site in Todos Santos has rolling terrain that requires accurate topo data for casita placement and drainage design.

document_details.name: hydrologic_study
document_details.rationale: Required due to seasonal arroyo on the south boundary of the site. The arroyo represents a hydrologic feature that must be studied to determine flood risk, setback requirements, and drainage strategy. This is a regulatory and design-critical requirement triggered specifically by this site condition.

document_details.name: soil_mechanics_study
document_details.rationale: Required for commercial projects — this is a 3,000 sqm commercial hotel. Rolling terrain further necessitates soil analysis to determine foundation strategy and bearing capacity.

document_details.name: property_title
document_details.rationale: Property title must be confirmed before entering design contract. Client indicated ownership — formal document confirmation required.
